  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=components\CustomCursorjsx anchor=true>components\CustomCursorjsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect, useRef } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">CustomCursor</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> dotRef = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ringRef = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);

  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> dot = dotRef.current;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ring = ringRef.current;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (!dot || !ring) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;

    <span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> mx = <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, my = <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> rx = <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, ry = <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> rafId;

    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> onMove = <span class="hljs-function">(<span class="hljs-params">e</span>) =&gt;</span> { mx = e.clientX; my = e.clientY; };

    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> loop = <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      <span class="hljs-comment">// Dot follows instantly</span>
      dot.style.left = mx + <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;px&#x27;</span>;
      dot.style.top = my + <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;px&#x27;</span>;
      <span class="hljs-comment">// Ring follows with lag</span>
      rx += (mx - rx) * <span class="hljs-number">0.12</span>;
      ry += (my - ry) * <span class="hljs-number">0.12</span>;
      ring.style.left = rx + <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;px&#x27;</span>;
      ring.style.top = ry + <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;px&#x27;</span>;
      rafId = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
    };

    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> onEnter = <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> ring.classList.add(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;hovered&#x27;</span>);
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> onLeave = <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> ring.classList.remove(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;hovered&#x27;</span>);

    <span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mousemove&#x27;</span>, onMove, { <span class="hljs-attr">passive</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> });
    rafId = requestAnimationFrame(loop);

    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> attach = <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.querySelectorAll(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;a, button, [data-cursor], .listing-card, .service-list li, .accordion-item, .elaris-letter-wrap&#x27;</span>).forEach(<span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-params">el</span> =&gt;</span> {
        el.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mouseenter&#x27;</span>, onEnter);
        el.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mouseleave&#x27;</span>, onLeave);
      });
    };
    <span class="hljs-comment">// Attach after mount</span>
    <span class="hljs-built_in">setTimeout</span>(attach, <span class="hljs-number">500</span>);

    <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      <span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.removeEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mousemove&#x27;</span>, onMove);
      cancelAnimationFrame(rafId);
    };
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{dotRef}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;cursor-dot&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{ringRef}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;cursor-ring&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=components\sections\Aboutjsx anchor=true>components\sections\Aboutjsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect, useRef } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> Image <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;next/image&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap, ScrollTrigger } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;../../lib/gsap&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> stats = [
  { <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>: <span class="hljs-number">500</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">suffix</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;+&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Properties Sold in Dubai&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2.4</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">suffix</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;B+&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;AED Value Closed&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>: <span class="hljs-number">96</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">suffix</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Client Satisfaction Rate&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>: <span class="hljs-number">18</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">suffix</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;yrs&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Years in Dubai Market&#x27;</span> },
];

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">About</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ref = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);

  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.matchMedia(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)&#x27;</span>).matches) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ctx = gsap.context(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.about-label&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.7</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 80%&#x27;</span> } });
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.about-left-child&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">50</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.14</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.9</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 72%&#x27;</span> } });
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.about-right-img&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: <span class="hljs-number">70</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 68%&#x27;</span> } });
      <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.innerWidth &gt; <span class="hljs-number">768</span>) {
        gsap.to(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.about-right-img img&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">yPercent</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">12</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;none&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top bottom&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">end</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;bottom top&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrub</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.5</span> } });
      }
      <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.querySelectorAll(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.stat-number&#x27;</span>).forEach(<span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-params">el</span> =&gt;</span> {
        <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> target = <span class="hljs-built_in">parseFloat</span>(el.dataset.target);
        ScrollTrigger.create({
          <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: el, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 88%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">once</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>,
          <span class="hljs-attr">onEnter</span>: <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
            gsap.to({ <span class="hljs-attr">val</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> }, {
              <span class="hljs-attr">val</span>: target, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2.2</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span>,
              <span class="hljs-attr">onUpdate</span>: <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> (<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
                <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> v = <span class="hljs-built_in">this</span>.targets()[<span class="hljs-number">0</span>].val;
                el.textContent = (target % <span class="hljs-number">1</span> !== <span class="hljs-number">0</span> ? v.toFixed(<span class="hljs-number">1</span>) : <span class="hljs-built_in">Math</span>.ceil(v)) + el.dataset.suffix;
              },
            });
          },
        });
      });
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.stat-card&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">40</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.8</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.stats-bar&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 85%&#x27;</span> } });
    }, ref);
    <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> ctx.revert();
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">section</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{ref}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;about&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;relative&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">F5EDE3</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[55%_45%] min-h-[85vh]&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex flex-col justify-center px-6 sm:px-10 lg:px-16 py-16 sm:py-20 gap-5 sm:gap-6&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;about-label about-left-child font-dm text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>Why Elaris<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;about-left-child w-[90px] sm:w-[110px] h-[90px] sm:h-[110px] rounded-lg overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">Image</span> <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c?w=400&amp;q=80&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">alt</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;Dubai property&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">width</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{110}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{110}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;object-cover w-full h-full&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h2</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;about-left-child font-cormorant font-semibold text-charcoal leading-tight&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">1.8rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">4vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">2.9rem</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            Dubai&#x27;s Most Trusted<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">br</span> /&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">em</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-light&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Property Advisors<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">em</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h2</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;about-left-child font-dm text-[13px] sm:text-[14px] leading-relaxed max-w-md&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">46</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">42</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">36</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.65</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            We connect discerning buyers and investors with Dubai&#x27;s most exclusive properties. From off-plan investments to ready villas — every listing is handpicked for value, location, and lifestyle.
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;about-left-child font-dm text-[13px] sm:text-[14px] leading-relaxed max-w-md&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">46</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">42</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">36</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.65</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            DLD registered and RERA licensed, we operate with full transparency — no hidden fees, no pressure, just expert guidance for your most important investment.
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;#listings&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;about-left-child font-dm text-[11px] sm:text-[12px] tracking-widest text-cream px-7 sm:px-8 py-3.5 sm:py-4 rounded-full inline-flex w-fit hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity mt-1&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">2E2A24</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            Our Properties →
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;relative flex items-center justify-center lg:justify-start py-12 lg:py-0 px-6 lg:px-0 overflow-hidden lg:overflow-visible&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;about-right-img relative overflow-hidden shadow-2xl w-full max-w-sm lg:max-w-none&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">280px</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">50vh</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">440px</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">borderRadius:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">16px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">0</span> <span class="hljs-attr">0</span> <span class="hljs-attr">16px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">Image</span> <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1616137466211-f939a420be84?w=700&amp;q=85&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">alt</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;Dubai luxury interior&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fill</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;object-cover&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">sizes</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;(max-width: 1024px) 90vw, 45vw&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;stats-bar grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">2E2A24</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
        {stats.map((s, i) =&gt; (
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;stat-card flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-8 sm:py-10 px-4 border-r border-white/10 last:border-r-0 gap-1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;stat-number font-cormorant font-bold text-white&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">2rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">4vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">3rem</span>)&#x27; }} <span class="hljs-attr">data-target</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{s.value}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">data-suffix</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{s.suffix}</span>&gt;</span>0{s.suffix}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] tracking-[0.18em] uppercase text-white/45&quot;</span>&gt;</span>{s.label}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        ))}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">section</span>&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=components\sections\Footerjsx anchor=true>components\sections\Footerjsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect, useRef } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap, ScrollTrigger } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;../../lib/gsap&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> LETTER_DATA = [
  { <span class="hljs-attr">letter</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;E&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600607687939-ce8a6c25118c?w=400&amp;q=80&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Downtown Dubai&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">letter</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;L&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c?w=400&amp;q=80&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Palm Jumeirah&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">letter</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;A&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600566753190-17f0baa2a6c3?w=400&amp;q=80&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;DIFC Residences&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">letter</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;R&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512917774080-9991f1c4c750?w=400&amp;q=80&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Private Villas&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">letter</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;I&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600047509807-ba8f99d2cdde?w=400&amp;q=80&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Dubai Marina&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">letter</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;S&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600210492493-0946911123ea?w=400&amp;q=80&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;JBR Penthouses&#x27;</span> },
];

<span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> footerLinks = {
  <span class="hljs-attr">Social</span>: [
    { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Instagram&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#&#x27;</span> }, { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Pinterest&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#&#x27;</span> },
    { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;LinkedIn&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#&#x27;</span> }, { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Twitter / X&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#&#x27;</span> },
  ],
  <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Quick Links&#x27;</span>: [
    { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Properties&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#listings&#x27;</span> }, { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;About ELARIS&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#about&#x27;</span> },
    { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Our Services&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#services&#x27;</span> }, { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Contact&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#contact&#x27;</span> },
  ],
  <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Property Types&#x27;</span>: [
    { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Apartments&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#&#x27;</span> }, { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Villas &amp; Townhouses&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#&#x27;</span> },
    { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Penthouses&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#&#x27;</span> }, { <span class="hljs-attr">label</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Off-Plan Projects&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#&#x27;</span> },
  ],
};

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">Footer</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> footerRef    = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> megaRef      = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> hoverCardRef = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> hoverImgRef  = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> hoverLabelRef = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> mouseXRef    = useRef(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> mouseYRef    = useRef(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>);

  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-keyword">typeof</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">window</span> === <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;undefined&#x27;</span>) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.matchMedia(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)&#x27;</span>).matches) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ctx = gsap.context(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.footer-top-left &gt; *&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">35</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.12</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.9</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.footer-top-left&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 82%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">once</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> } });
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.footer-top-right &gt; *&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">35</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.12</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.9</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.footer-top-right&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 82%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">once</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> } });
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.footer-col&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">30</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.09</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.8</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.footer-cols&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 85%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">once</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> } });

      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> letters = gsap.utils.toArray(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.elaris-mega-letter&#x27;</span>);
      gsap.set(letters, { <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;105%&#x27;</span> });
      gsap.to(letters, { <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;0%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.06</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;none&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: megaRef.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 95%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">end</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 30%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrub</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.2</span> } });

      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> card = hoverCardRef.current;
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> cardImg = hoverImgRef.current;
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> cardLabel = hoverLabelRef.current;
      <span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> cardInitialised = <span class="hljs-literal">false</span>;

      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> onMouseMove = <span class="hljs-function">(<span class="hljs-params">e</span>) =&gt;</span> {
        mouseXRef.current = e.clientX; mouseYRef.current = e.clientY;
        <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (!cardInitialised) { gsap.set(card, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: e.clientX - <span class="hljs-number">80</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: e.clientY - <span class="hljs-number">130</span> }); cardInitialised = <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>; }
        gsap.to(card, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: e.clientX - <span class="hljs-number">80</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: e.clientY - <span class="hljs-number">130</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.18</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">overwrite</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;auto&#x27;</span> });
      };
      <span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mousemove&#x27;</span>, onMouseMove, { <span class="hljs-attr">passive</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> });

      letters.forEach(<span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-params">letter</span> =&gt;</span> {
        letter.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mouseenter&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
          <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (cardImg.src !== letter.dataset.image) cardImg.src = letter.dataset.image;
          <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (cardLabel) cardLabel.textContent = letter.dataset.label;
          gsap.to(card, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">rotation</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">1.5</span> + <span class="hljs-built_in">Math</span>.random() * <span class="hljs-number">3</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.38</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;back.out(1.4)&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">overwrite</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> });
          gsap.to(letter, { <span class="hljs-attr">color</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#FFFFFF&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.25</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span> });
        });
        letter.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mouseleave&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
          gsap.to(card, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.85</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">rotation</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">3</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.28</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.in&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">overwrite</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> });
          gsap.to(letter, { <span class="hljs-attr">color</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#FAF7F2&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.28</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span> });
        });
      });

      <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.removeEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mousemove&#x27;</span>, onMouseMove);
    }, footerRef);
    <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> ctx.revert();
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">footer</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{footerRef}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;contact&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">2E2A24</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">cursor:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">default</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-10 sm:gap-14 px-6 sm:px-10 md:px-14 pt-16 sm:pt-20 pb-12 sm:pb-16 border-b&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">borderColor:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.08</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;footer-top-left flex flex-col gap-5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>Get In Touch<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h2</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-cormorant font-semibold leading-tight&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">FAF7F2</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">1.6rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">3.5vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">2.75rem</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            Discover Dubai&#x27;s Finest<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">br</span> /&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">em</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-light&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Properties with ELARIS<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">em</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h2</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;footer-top-right flex flex-col justify-center items-start md:items-end gap-5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex items-center gap-3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex items-center&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
              {[&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?w=80&amp;q=80&#x27;,&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=80&amp;q=80&#x27;,&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1531746020798-e6953c6e8e04?w=80&amp;q=80&#x27;].map((src, i) =&gt; (
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">img</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{src}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">alt</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;client&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;w-9 h-9 rounded-full object-cover&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">border:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">2px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">solid</span> #<span class="hljs-attr">2E2A24</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">marginLeft:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">i</span> === <span class="hljs-string">0</span> ? <span class="hljs-attr">0</span> <span class="hljs-attr">:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">-8px</span>&#x27; }} /&gt;</span>
              ))}
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-cormorant text-white font-semibold text-lg leading-tight&quot;</span>&gt;</span>500+ Happy Clients<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[11px]&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>Across Dubai<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;#lead-form&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[12px] tracking-widest text-white px-7 py-3.5 rounded-full border hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">borderColor:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.22</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            Book a Viewing →
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;footer-cols grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-8 px-6 sm:px-10 md:px-14 py-10 sm:py-14 border-b&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">borderColor:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.08</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
        {Object.entries(footerLinks).map(([col, links]) =&gt; (
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{col}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;footer-col&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h4</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px] tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-white/30 mb-5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>{col}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h4</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">ul</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex flex-col gap-2.5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
              {links.map(link =&gt; (
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">li</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{link.label}</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{link.href}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[13px] text-white/50 hover:text-white transition-colors flex items-center gap-1 group&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
                    {link.label}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity text-xs&quot;</span>&gt;</span>↗<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>
              ))}
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">ul</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        ))}
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;footer-col&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h4</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px] tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-white/30 mb-5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Location<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h4</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">address</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;not-italic font-dm text-[13px] text-white/50 leading-relaxed&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
            ELARIS Real Estate LLC<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">br</span> /&gt;</span>DIFC Gate Building, Level 5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">br</span> /&gt;</span>Dubai, UAE
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">address</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;tel:+97140000000&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[13px] text-white/50 hover:text-white transition-colors block mt-3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>+971 4 XXX XXXX<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[11px] mt-2&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">196</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">184</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">168</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.5</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>DLD Registered Broker<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[11px]&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">196</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">184</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">168</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.5</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>RERA No: XXXXXXXXX<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between px-6 sm:px-10 md:px-14 py-5 gap-3 border-t&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">borderColor:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.08</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[11px]&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>© 2026 ELARIS Real Estate LLC. DLD Licensed. All rights reserved.<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex items-center gap-5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;#&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[11px] text-white/25 hover:text-white/55 transition-colors&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Privacy Policy<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;#&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[11px] text-white/25 hover:text-white/55 transition-colors&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Terms of Service<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      {/* Floating hover card */}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;elaris-hover-card&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{hoverCardRef}</span>&gt;</span>
        {/* eslint-disable-next-line @next/next/no-img-element */}
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">img</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{hoverImgRef}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">alt</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;elaris-hover-card-label&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{hoverLabelRef}</span> /&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      {/* ELARIS mega text */}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;elaris-mega-wrapper&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{megaRef}</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;elaris-mega-row&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          {LETTER_DATA.map((item, i) =&gt; (
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;elaris-mega-letter&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">data-index</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">data-image</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{item.image}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">data-label</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{item.label}</span>&gt;</span>{item.letter}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
          ))}
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">footer</span>&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=components\sections\Herojsx anchor=true>components\sections\Herojsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect, useRef } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> Image <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;next/image&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap, ScrollTrigger } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;../../lib/gsap&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> h1Words = [<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Find&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Your&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Space&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Above&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;the&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Dubai&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Skyline&#x27;</span>];

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">Hero</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ref = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);

  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.matchMedia(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)&#x27;</span>).matches) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ctx = gsap.context(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> tl = gsap.timeline({ <span class="hljs-attr">defaults</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span> } });
      tl
        .from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.nav&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">40</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.9</span> })
        .from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.hero-bg img&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power1.out&#x27;</span> }, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>)
        .from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.h1-word&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">clipPath</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;inset(0 0 100% 0)&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power4.out&#x27;</span> }, <span class="hljs-number">0.35</span>)
        .from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.hero-body&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.7</span> }, <span class="hljs-number">1.0</span>)
        .from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.hero-cta&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">18</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.12</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.6</span> }, <span class="hljs-number">1.25</span>)
        .from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.hero-scroll-ind&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span> }, <span class="hljs-number">1.6</span>);

      <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.innerWidth &gt; <span class="hljs-number">768</span>) {
        gsap.to(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.hero-bg img&#x27;</span>, {
          <span class="hljs-attr">yPercent</span>: <span class="hljs-number">28</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;none&#x27;</span>,
          <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.hero-section&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top top&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">end</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;bottom top&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrub</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.2</span> },
        });
      }
    }, ref);
    <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> ctx.revert();
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">section</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{ref}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;hero-section relative w-full overflow-hidden&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">100svh</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">minHeight:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">600px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;hero-bg absolute inset-0 w-full h-full&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">Image</span>
          <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618221195710-dd6b41faaea6?w=1800&amp;q=85&quot;</span>
          <span class="hljs-attr">alt</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;Dubai luxury property&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fill</span> <span class="hljs-attr">priority</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;object-cover&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">sizes</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;100vw&quot;</span>
        /&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;absolute inset-0&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">linear-gradient</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">to</span> <span class="hljs-attr">top</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.78</span>) <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>%, <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.22</span>) <span class="hljs-attr">55</span>%, <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.05</span>) <span class="hljs-attr">100</span>%)&#x27; }} /&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">nav</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;nav absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-6 sm:px-10 md:px-14 py-7&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">button</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-white text-sm tracking-widest opacity-75 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity&quot;</span>&gt;</span>≡ <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;nbsp;</span>Menu<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">button</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-cormorant text-white text-base sm:text-lg tracking-[0.3em] font-semibold&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontVariant:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">small-caps</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>◎ ELARIS<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span>
          <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;https://wa.me/971XXXXXXXXX?text=I&#x27;m%20interested%20in%20Dubai%20properties&quot;</span>

          <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;nav-pill font-dm text-white text-[11px] tracking-widest px-4 sm:px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full hidden sm:flex items-center gap-2&quot;</span>
        &gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">svg</span> <span class="hljs-attr">viewBox</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;0 0 24 24&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">width</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;13&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;13&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fill</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;currentColor&quot;</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">path</span> <span class="hljs-attr">d</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347z&quot;</span>/&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">path</span> <span class="hljs-attr">d</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;M12 0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 2.122.558 4.112 1.528 5.837L.057 23.885a.5.5 0 00.612.612l6.048-1.471A11.946 11.946 0 0012 24c6.627 0 12-5.373 12-12S18.627 0 12 0zm0 21.818a9.814 9.814 0 01-5.028-1.382l-.36-.214-3.732.907.922-3.646-.235-.374A9.818 9.818 0 012.182 12C2.182 6.57 6.57 2.182 12 2.182S21.818 6.57 21.818 12 17.43 21.818 12 21.818z&quot;</span>/&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">svg</span>&gt;</span>
          WhatsApp Us →
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">nav</span>&gt;</span>

      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-10 px-6 sm:px-10 md:px-14 pb-14 sm:pb-20&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;max-w-4xl&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase text-white/50 mb-4 block&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Dubai Luxury Properties<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h1</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-cormorant font-bold text-white leading-[0.95] mb-5 sm:mb-6&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">2.6rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">6.5vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">5.5rem</span>)&#x27; }} <span class="hljs-attr">aria-label</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{h1Words.join(</span>&#x27; &#x27;)}&gt;</span>
            {h1Words.map((w, i) =&gt; (
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;h1-word&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">display:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">inline-block</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">overflow:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">hidden</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">marginRight:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">0.22em</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{w}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            ))}
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h1</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;hero-body font-dm text-white/65 text-[13px] sm:text-sm leading-relaxed mb-7 sm:mb-8 max-w-md&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
            Palm Jumeirah. Downtown Dubai. DIFC. Marina.<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">br</span> /&gt;</span>
            Handpicked properties from AED 2M to AED 50M+
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex items-center gap-3 sm:gap-4 flex-wrap&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;#listings&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;hero-cta font-dm bg-white text-[11px] sm:text-xs tracking-widest px-6 sm:px-7 py-3 sm:py-3.5 rounded-full hover:bg-cream transition-colors&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">2E2A24</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
              View Properties →
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;#lead-form&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;hero-cta font-dm text-white text-[11px] sm:text-xs tracking-widest px-6 sm:px-7 py-3 sm:py-3.5 rounded-full border border-white/35 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
              Request Private Viewing
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;hero-scroll-ind absolute bottom-14 sm:bottom-20 right-6 sm:right-14 z-10 flex flex-col items-center gap-3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-white/50 text-[9px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">writingMode:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">vertical-rl</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>Scroll<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;scroll-chevron text-white/50 text-base&quot;</span>&gt;</span>↓<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">section</span>&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=components\sections\LeadFormjsx anchor=true>components\sections\LeadFormjsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect, useRef, useState } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;../../lib/gsap&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">LeadForm</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ref = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> [form, setForm] = useState({ <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">email</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">phone</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">type</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">budget</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">message</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;&#x27;</span> });
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(<span class="hljs-literal">false</span>);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> handleChange = <span class="hljs-function">(<span class="hljs-params">e</span>) =&gt;</span> setForm(<span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-params">prev</span> =&gt;</span> ({ ...prev, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }));

  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> handleSubmit = <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (!form.name || !form.email || !form.phone) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    <span class="hljs-comment">// In production: POST to API/CRM here</span>
    setSubmitted(<span class="hljs-literal">true</span>);
    gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.success-msg&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.6</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span> });
  };

  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.matchMedia(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)&#x27;</span>).matches) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ctx = gsap.context(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.lead-left &gt; *&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">50</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.12</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.9</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 75%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">once</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> } });
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.lead-right&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.9</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">delay</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.2</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 75%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">once</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> } });
    }, ref);
    <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> ctx.revert();
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> inputStyle = { <span class="hljs-attr">width</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;100%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">background</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;transparent&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">border</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;none&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">borderBottom</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;1px solid rgba(46,42,36,0.15)&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;10px 0&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;DM Sans, sans-serif&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;14px&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">fontWeight</span>: <span class="hljs-number">300</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">color</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#2E2A24&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">outline</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;none&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">transition</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;border-color 0.2s ease&#x27;</span> };
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> labelStyle = { <span class="hljs-attr">display</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;block&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;DM Sans, sans-serif&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;11px&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">letterSpacing</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;0.2em&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">textTransform</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;uppercase&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">color</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#C4B8A8&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">marginBottom</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;6px&#x27;</span> };

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">section</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{ref}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;lead-form&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">F5EDE3</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">padding:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">4rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">8vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">7rem</span>) <span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">1.25rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">5vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">3.5rem</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 lg:gap-16 max-w-6xl mx-auto&quot;</span>&gt;</span>

        {/* Left */}
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;lead-left flex flex-col justify-center gap-6&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>Get In Touch<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h2</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-cormorant font-semibold text-charcoal leading-tight&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">2rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">4vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">3rem</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            Schedule Your<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">br</span> /&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">em</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-light&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Private Viewing<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">em</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h2</span>&gt;</span>
