          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[13px] sm:text-[14px] leading-relaxed max-w-sm&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            Our advisors are available 7 days a week.<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">br</span> /&gt;</span>Response guaranteed within 2 hours.
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

          {/* Trust signals */}
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex flex-col gap-3 mt-2&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
            {[
              &#x27;No broker fees&#x27;,
              &#x27;DLD registered &amp; RERA licensed&#x27;,
              &#x27;WhatsApp response in under 2 hours&#x27;,
              &#x27;Multilingual team — Arabic, English, Russian, Hindi&#x27;,
              &#x27;Golden Visa property guidance available&#x27;,
            ].map((item, i) =&gt; (
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex items-center gap-3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;text-charcoal font-bold text-sm flex-shrink-0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>✓<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[13px]&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">46</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">42</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">36</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.7</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{item}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
            ))}
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

        {/* Right — form card */}
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;lead-right&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">white</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">borderRadius:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">20px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">padding:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">1.5rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">4vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">2.5rem</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">boxShadow:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">0</span> <span class="hljs-attr">24px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">60px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">20</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">17</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">14</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.08</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
          {submitted ? (
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;success-msg flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center gap-4 py-12&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;text-4xl&quot;</span>&gt;</span>✓<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h3</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-cormorant font-semibold text-charcoal text-2xl&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Enquiry Received<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h3</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[13px]&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>We&#x27;ll be in touch within 2 hours. Check your WhatsApp and email.<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{</span>`<span class="hljs-attr">https:</span>//<span class="hljs-attr">wa.me</span>/<span class="hljs-attr">971XXXXXXXXX</span>?<span class="hljs-attr">text</span>=<span class="hljs-string">Hi%20ELARIS%2C%20I%20just%20submitted%20an%20enquiry.%20My%20name%20is%20${encodeURIComponent(form.name)}</span>`}
                <span class="hljs-attr">target</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;_blank&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">rel</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;noopener noreferrer&quot;</span>
                <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[12px] tracking-widest text-cream px-8 py-3.5 rounded-full hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity&quot;</span>
                <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">25D366</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
                Continue on WhatsApp →
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
          ) : (
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">role</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;form&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex flex-col gap-5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">label</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{labelStyle}</span>&gt;</span>Full Name *<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">label</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">input</span> <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;name&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{form.name}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">onChange</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{handleChange}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">placeholder</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;Sarah Al Maktoum&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{inputStyle}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">onFocus</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{e</span> =&gt;</span> e.target.style.borderBottomColor = &#x27;#2E2A24&#x27;} onBlur={e =&gt; e.target.style.borderBottomColor = &#x27;rgba(46,42,36,0.15)&#x27;} /&gt;
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">label</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{labelStyle}</span>&gt;</span>Email Address *<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">label</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">input</span> <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;email&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">type</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;email&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{form.email}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">onChange</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{handleChange}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">placeholder</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;you@example.com&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{inputStyle}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">onFocus</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{e</span> =&gt;</span> e.target.style.borderBottomColor = &#x27;#2E2A24&#x27;} onBlur={e =&gt; e.target.style.borderBottomColor = &#x27;rgba(46,42,36,0.15)&#x27;} /&gt;
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">label</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{labelStyle}</span>&gt;</span>Phone / WhatsApp *<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">label</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">display:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">flex</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">alignItems:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">center</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">gap:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">8px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">borderBottom:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">1px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">solid</span> <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">46</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">42</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">36</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.15</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[13px]&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">flexShrink:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">paddingBottom:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">10px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">paddingTop:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">10px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>+971<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">input</span> <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;phone&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{form.phone}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">onChange</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{handleChange}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">placeholder</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;50 123 4567&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">...inputStyle</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">borderBottom:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">none</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">flex:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">1</span> }} /&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">label</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{labelStyle}</span>&gt;</span>Property Type<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">label</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">select</span> <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;type&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{form.type}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">onChange</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{handleChange}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">...inputStyle</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">cursor:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">pointer</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">option</span> <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Select type<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>Apartment<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>Villa<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>Penthouse<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>Off-Plan<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">select</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">label</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{labelStyle}</span>&gt;</span>Budget Range<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">label</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">select</span> <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;budget&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{form.budget}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">onChange</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{handleChange}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">...inputStyle</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">cursor:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">pointer</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">option</span> <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Select budget<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>AED 1–3M<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>AED 3–7M<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>AED 7–15M<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>AED 15M+<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">option</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">select</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">label</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{labelStyle}</span>&gt;</span>Message<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">label</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">textarea</span> <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;message&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">value</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{form.message}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">onChange</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{handleChange}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">rows</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{3}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">placeholder</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;Tell us your requirements — location, bedrooms, move-in date...&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">...inputStyle</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">resize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">vertical</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">paddingTop:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">10px</span>&#x27; }} /&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">button</span>
                <span class="hljs-attr">onClick</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{handleSubmit}</span>
                <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm tracking-widest text-cream hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity&quot;</span>
                <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">width:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">100</span>%&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">2E2A24</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">padding:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">16px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">24px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">borderRadius:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">100px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">14px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">letterSpacing:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">0.05em</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">border:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">none</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">cursor:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">pointer</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">marginTop:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">4px</span>&#x27; }}
              &gt;</span>
                Send Enquiry →
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">button</span>&gt;</span>

              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[12px] text-center&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
                Or reach us directly on{&#x27; &#x27;}
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;https://wa.me/971XXXXXXXXX&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">target</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;_blank&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">rel</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;noopener noreferrer&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">25D366</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">textDecoration:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">none</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
                  WhatsApp
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
          )}
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">section</span>&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=components\sections\Listingsjsx anchor=true>components\sections\Listingsjsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect, useRef } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> Image <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;next/image&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap, ScrollTrigger } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;../../lib/gsap&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> listings = [
  { <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;A&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">title</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Marina Heights Apartment&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">price</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;AED 3,200,000&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">location</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Dubai Marina, UAE&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">tag</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Apartment&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">specs</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;2 Beds · 1,450 sqft · Floor 28&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1617806118233-18e1de247200?w=800&amp;q=80&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;B&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">title</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;DIFC Glass Tower Residence&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">price</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;AED 5,800,000&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">location</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;DIFC, Dubai&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">tag</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Residence&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">specs</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;3 Beds · 2,100 sqft · Floor 42&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600607687939-ce8a6c25118c?w=800&amp;q=80&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;C&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">title</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Palm Jumeirah Garden Villa&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">price</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;AED 28,500,000&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">location</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Palm Jumeirah, Dubai&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">tag</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Villa&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">specs</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;5 Beds · Pool · Direct Beach · 6,800 sqft&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154526-990dced4db0d?w=1200&amp;q=85&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">featured</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;D&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">title</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Downtown Burj View Apartment&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">price</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;AED 7,200,000&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">location</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Downtown Dubai, UAE&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">tag</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Apartment&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">specs</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;3 Beds · Burj View · 2,400 sqft&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556909114-f6e7ad7d3136?w=800&amp;q=80&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;E&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">title</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;JBR Beachfront Penthouse&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">price</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;AED 12,900,000&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">location</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;JBR, Dubai&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">tag</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Penthouse&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">specs</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;4 Beds · Sea View · 3,600 sqft&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600047509807-ba8f99d2cdde?w=800&amp;q=80&#x27;</span> },
];

<span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> headingText = <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Discover Newly Listed Luxury Properties in Dubai&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">Listings</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> listingsRef = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);

  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-keyword">typeof</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">window</span> === <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;undefined&#x27;</span>) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.matchMedia(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)&#x27;</span>).matches) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    ScrollTrigger.refresh();
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ctx = gsap.context(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> headingWords = gsap.utils.toArray(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.listings-word&#x27;</span>);
      <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (headingWords.length &gt; <span class="hljs-number">0</span>) {
        gsap.set(headingWords, { <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;110%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> });
        gsap.to(headingWords, { <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;0%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.08</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.95</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power4.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.listings-heading-wrap&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 82%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">toggleActions</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;play none none none&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">once</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> } });
      }
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> cards = gsap.utils.toArray(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.listing-card&#x27;</span>);
      gsap.set(cards, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">80</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.97</span> });
      cards.forEach(<span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-params">card</span> =&gt;</span> {
        <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> img = card.querySelector(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;img&#x27;</span>);
        <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> title = card.querySelector(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.card-title&#x27;</span>);
        gsap.to(card, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: card, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 85%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">toggleActions</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;play none none none&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">once</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> } });
        <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (img) {
          gsap.from(img, { <span class="hljs-attr">clipPath</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;inset(0 0 100% 0)&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.2</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power4.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: card, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 85%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">toggleActions</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;play none none none&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">once</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> } });
          <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.innerWidth &gt; <span class="hljs-number">768</span>) {
            gsap.fromTo(img, { <span class="hljs-attr">yPercent</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">8</span> }, { <span class="hljs-attr">yPercent</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;none&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: card, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top bottom&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">end</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;bottom top&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrub</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.5</span> } });
          }
        }
        card.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mouseenter&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
          gsap.to(img, { <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.07</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.7</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span> });
          gsap.to(card, { <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">8</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.4</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span> });
          <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (title) gsap.to(title, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.3</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span> });
        });
        card.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mouseleave&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
          gsap.to(img, { <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.9</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.inOut&#x27;</span> });
          gsap.to(card, { <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.inOut&#x27;</span> });
          <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (title) gsap.to(title, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.4</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.inOut&#x27;</span> });
        });
      });
    }, listingsRef);
    <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> ctx.revert();
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">section</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{listingsRef}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;listings&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;overflow-hidden&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">F5EDE3</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;section-pad pb-4&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase mb-2&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>New Listings<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;listings-heading-wrap overflow-hidden mb-2&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h2</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;listings-heading font-cormorant font-semibold text-charcoal leading-tight&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">2rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">5vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">3.5rem</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            {headingText.split(&#x27; &#x27;).map((word, i) =&gt; (
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;listings-word&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">display:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">inline-block</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">overflow:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">hidden</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">marginRight:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">0.25em</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{word}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            ))}
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h2</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[12px] sm:text-[13px]&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
          Handpicked from Palm Jumeirah, Downtown, Marina <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;amp;</span> DIFC — updated weekly.
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      {/* Desktop grid */}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;hidden md:grid section-pad pt-6 gap-5&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">gridTemplateColumns:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">repeat</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">12</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">1fr</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">gridAutoRows:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">auto</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">alignItems:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">start</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">gridColumn:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">1</span> / <span class="hljs-attr">5</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">ListingCard</span> <span class="hljs-attr">listing</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{listings[0]}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">imgHeight</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;230px&quot;</span> /&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">gridColumn:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">7</span> / <span class="hljs-attr">13</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">ListingCard</span> <span class="hljs-attr">listing</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{listings[1]}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">imgHeight</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;230px&quot;</span> /&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">gridColumn:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">2</span> / <span class="hljs-attr">11</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">marginTop:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">20px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">ListingCard</span> <span class="hljs-attr">listing</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{listings[2]}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">imgHeight</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;360px&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">featured</span> /&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">gridColumn:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">1</span> / <span class="hljs-attr">6</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">marginTop:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">20px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">ListingCard</span> <span class="hljs-attr">listing</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{listings[3]}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">imgHeight</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;250px&quot;</span> /&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">gridColumn:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">7</span> / <span class="hljs-attr">13</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">marginTop:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">20px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">ListingCard</span> <span class="hljs-attr">listing</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{listings[4]}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">imgHeight</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;250px&quot;</span> /&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      {/* View all button */}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;hidden md:flex justify-center pb-16 pt-10&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;#lead-form&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[12px] tracking-widest text-cream px-10 py-4 rounded-full hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">2E2A24</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
          View All Listings →
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      {/* Mobile scroll */}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;listings-mobile-scroll md:hidden flex gap-4 px-5 pb-8 pt-4&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        {listings.map(l =&gt; (
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{l.id}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;listing-card flex-shrink-0 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">width:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">260px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollSnapAlign:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">start</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">FAF7F2</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;relative overflow-hidden&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">180px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">Image</span> <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{l.image}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">alt</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{l.title}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fill</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;object-cover&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">sizes</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;260px&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;p-4&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[9px] tracking-widest uppercase mb-1 block&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{l.tag}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h3</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;card-title font-cormorant font-semibold text-charcoal text-lg mb-1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>{l.title}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h3</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm font-medium text-charcoal text-sm mb-1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>{l.price}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px]&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{l.specs}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        ))}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">section</span>&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

<span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">ListingCard</span>(<span class="hljs-params">{ listing, imgHeight, featured }</span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;listing-card rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">FAF7F2</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">cursor:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">none</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">position:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">relative</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;img-wrap relative overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">imgHeight</span> }}&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">Image</span> <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{listing.image}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">alt</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{listing.title}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fill</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;object-cover&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">sizes</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 50vw&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">transformOrigin:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">center</span> <span class="hljs-attr">center</span>&#x27; }} /&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;absolute top-3 left-3 z-10&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[9px] tracking-widest uppercase text-white/85 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">20</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">17</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">14</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.35</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">backdropFilter:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">blur</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">8px</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">WebkitBackdropFilter:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">blur</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">8px</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{listing.tag}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        {featured &amp;&amp; (
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;absolute top-3 right-3 z-10&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[9px] tracking-widest uppercase text-cream px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">2E2A24</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>FEATURED<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        )}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;p-4 sm:p-5 flex flex-col gap-1.5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex items-start justify-between gap-3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h3</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;card-title font-cormorant font-semibold text-charcoal leading-tight&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">featured</span> ? &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">1.25rem</span>&#x27; <span class="hljs-attr">:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">1.05rem</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{listing.title}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h3</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm font-medium text-charcoal text-sm flex-shrink-0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>{listing.price}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[11px]&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>📍 {listing.location}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px] tracking-wide&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{listing.specs}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;#lead-form&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px] tracking-widest transition-colors hover:text-charcoal mt-1&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>Enquire →<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=components\sections\Marqueejsx anchor=true>components\sections\Marqueejsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect, useRef } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap, ScrollTrigger } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;../../lib/gsap&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> TEXT = <span class="hljs-string">&quot;Dubai&#x27;s Most Exclusive Properties · AED 2M to AED 50M+ · &quot;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">Marquee</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ref = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);

  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.matchMedia(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)&#x27;</span>).matches) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ctx = gsap.context(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.marquee-section-inner&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">30</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.9</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 80%&#x27;</span> } });
      gsap.to(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.marquee-inner&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">xPercent</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">50</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">22</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;none&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">repeat</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">1</span> });
    }, ref);
    <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> ctx.revert();
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> copies = <span class="hljs-built_in">Array</span>(<span class="hljs-number">4</span>).fill(TEXT);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">section</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{ref}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;py-16 sm:py-20 flex flex-col items-center gap-12 overflow-hidden&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">FAF7F2</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;marquee-section-inner w-full flex flex-col items-center gap-12&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;marquee-track w-full overflow-hidden&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;marquee-inner&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
            {[...copies, ...copies].map((t, i) =&gt; (
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">aria-hidden</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i</span> &gt;</span>= copies.length} className=&quot;font-cormorant italic select-none px-2 sm:px-4&quot;
                style={{ color: &#x27;#2E2A24&#x27;, fontSize: &#x27;clamp(2.2rem, 6vw, 4.5rem)&#x27;, whiteSpace: &#x27;nowrap&#x27;, display: &#x27;inline-block&#x27; }}&gt;
                {t}
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            ))}
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span>
          <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;https://wa.me/971XXXXXXXXX?text=Hi%20ELARIS%2C%20I%20am%20interested%20in%20Dubai%20properties&quot;</span>
          <span class="hljs-attr">target</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;_blank&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">rel</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;noopener noreferrer&quot;</span>
          <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[11px] sm:text-[12px] tracking-widest text-cream px-8 sm:px-10 py-3.5 sm:py-4 rounded-full hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity flex items-center gap-2&quot;</span>
          <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">2E2A24</span>&#x27; }}
        &gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">svg</span> <span class="hljs-attr">viewBox</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;0 0 24 24&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">width</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;14&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;14&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fill</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;currentColor&quot;</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">path</span> <span class="hljs-attr">d</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347z&quot;</span>/&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">path</span> <span class="hljs-attr">d</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;M12 0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 2.122.558 4.112 1.528 5.837L.057 23.885a.5.5 0 00.612.612l6.048-1.471A11.946 11.946 0 0012 24c6.627 0 12-5.373 12-12S18.627 0 12 0zm0 21.818a9.814 9.814 0 01-5.028-1.382l-.36-.214-3.732.907.922-3.646-.235-.374A9.818 9.818 0 012.182 12C2.182 6.57 6.57 2.182 12 2.182S21.818 6.57 21.818 12 17.43 21.818 12 21.818z&quot;</span>/&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">svg</span>&gt;</span>
          WhatsApp an Advisor →
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">section</span>&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=components\sections\PropertyDetailjsx anchor=true>components\sections\PropertyDetailjsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect, useRef, useState } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> Image <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;next/image&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap, ScrollTrigger } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;../../lib/gsap&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">PropertyDetail</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ref = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> [activeDot, setActiveDot] = useState(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>);

  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.matchMedia(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)&#x27;</span>).matches) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ctx = gsap.context(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> tl = gsap.timeline({
        <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 65%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">once</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> },
      });
      tl
        .from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.property-img&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">clipPath</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;inset(0 100% 0 0)&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.3</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power4.inOut&#x27;</span> })
        .from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.property-card&#x27;</span>, {
          <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">55</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>,
          <span class="hljs-attr">webkitFilter</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;blur(8px)&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">filter</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;blur(8px)&#x27;</span>,
          <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.9</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>,
        }, <span class="hljs-number">0.65</span>)
        .from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.inset-card&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.88</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.7</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;back.out(1.4)&#x27;</span> }, <span class="hljs-number">1.05</span>)
        .from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.property-label&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span> }, <span class="hljs-number">1.1</span>);

      <span class="hljs-comment">// Image parallax</span>
      <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.innerWidth &gt; <span class="hljs-number">768</span>) {
        gsap.to(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.property-img img&#x27;</span>, {
          <span class="hljs-attr">yPercent</span>: <span class="hljs-number">18</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;none&#x27;</span>,
          <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top bottom&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">end</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;bottom top&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrub</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.5</span> },
        });
      }
    }, ref);
    <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> ctx.revert();
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">section</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{ref}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;relative w-full overflow-hidden&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">100svh</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">minHeight:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">560px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;property-img absolute inset-0 w-full h-full&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">clipPath:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">inset</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0</span> <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>% <span class="hljs-attr">0</span> <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">Image</span>
          <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600210492493-0946911123ea?w=1600&amp;q=85&quot;</span>
          <span class="hljs-attr">alt</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;Luxury property interior&quot;</span>
          <span class="hljs-attr">fill</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;object-cover&quot;</span>
          <span class="hljs-attr">sizes</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;100vw&quot;</span>
        /&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;absolute inset-0&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">linear-gradient</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">135deg</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.04</span>) <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>%, <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.3</span>) <span class="hljs-attr">100</span>%)&#x27; }} /&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      {/* Bottom-left card */}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;property-card absolute bottom-8 sm:bottom-10 left-6 sm:left-14 z-20 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-5 sm:p-6 w-[260px] sm:w-[300px]&quot;</span>
        <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">250</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">247</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">242</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.96</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">backdropFilter:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">blur</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">16px</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">WebkitBackdropFilter:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">blur</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">16px</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">WebkitFilter:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">blur</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">filter:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">blur</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h3</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-cormorant font-bold text-charcoal mb-1&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">1.35rem</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>Casa Lumina<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h3</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[12px] mb-3 flex items-center gap-1.5&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>📍 Coral Gables, FL<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[12px] leading-relaxed mb-4&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">46</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">42</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">36</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.58</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
          A masterwork of tropical modernism — dissolving boundaries between interior and the surrounding canopy.
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex items-center gap-2 mb-4&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          {[0,1,2,3].map(i =&gt; (
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">button</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">onClick</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{()</span> =&gt;</span> setActiveDot(i)}
              className=&quot;rounded-full transition-all duration-300&quot;
              style={{ width: activeDot===i?&#x27;20px&#x27;:&#x27;6px&#x27;, height:&#x27;6px&#x27;, background: activeDot===i?&#x27;#2E2A24&#x27;:&#x27;#C4B8A8&#x27; }} /&gt;
          ))}
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex items-center justify-between&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px] tracking-widest uppercase&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>Listed Price<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-cormorant font-bold text-charcoal text-xl&quot;</span>&gt;</span>$4,750,000<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">button</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[11px] tracking-widest text-cream px-4 py-2.5 rounded-full text-xs&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">2E2A24</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>View →<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">button</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      {/* Top-right inset */}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;inset-card absolute top-8 sm:top-10 right-6 sm:right-14 z-20 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-xl&quot;</span>
        <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">width:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">160px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">110px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">Image</span> <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1613490493576-7fde63acd811?w=400&amp;q=80&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">alt</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;Infinity view&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fill</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;object-cover&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">sizes</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;160px&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;absolute inset-0 flex items-end p-2.5&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">linear-gradient</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">to</span> <span class="hljs-attr">top</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.6</span>) <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>%, <span class="hljs-attr">transparent</span> <span class="hljs-attr">60</span>%)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-white text-[9px] tracking-widest uppercase&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Infinity View<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      {/* Right label */}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;property-label absolute right-6 sm:right-14 bottom-8 sm:bottom-10 z-10 text-right hidden sm:block&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-white/45 text-[10px] tracking-[0.2em] uppercase block&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Featured Property<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-cormorant italic text-white/30 text-lg&quot;</span>&gt;</span>01 / 08<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">section</span>&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=components\sections\PropertyHerojsx anchor=true>components\sections\PropertyHerojsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect, useRef, useState } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap, ScrollTrigger } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;../../lib/gsap&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> PROPERTIES = [
  {
    <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Burj Khalifa View Penthouse&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">location</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Downtown Dubai, UAE&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">description</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;52nd floor penthouse with unobstructed Burj Khalifa views. 4 beds, private pool, fully furnished by Bentley Home.&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">price</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;AED 18,500,000&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">tag</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;FEATURED PROPERTY&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">specs</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;🛏 4 Beds · 🚿 5 Baths · 📐 4,200 sqft&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600607687939-ce8a6c25118c?w=1920&amp;q=85&#x27;</span>,
  },
  {
    <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Palm Jumeirah Villa&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">location</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Palm Jumeirah, Dubai&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">description</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;5-bedroom beachfront villa with direct beach access, private pool, and panoramic Arabian Gulf views.&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">price</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;AED 32,000,000&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">tag</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;BEACHFRONT&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">specs</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;🛏 5 Beds · 🚿 6 Baths · 📐 8,500 sqft&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c?w=1920&amp;q=85&#x27;</span>,
  },
  {
    <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;DIFC Sky Residence&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">location</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;DIFC, Dubai&#x27;</span>,
