    <span class="hljs-attr">description</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Contemporary 3-bed residence in the heart of Dubai\&#x27;s financial district. Walk to Dubai Mall. ROI 7-9% guaranteed.&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">price</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;AED 8,200,000&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">tag</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;PENTHOUSE&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">specs</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;🛏 3 Beds · 🚿 4 Baths · 📐 2,800 sqft&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600566753190-17f0baa2a6c3?w=1920&amp;q=85&#x27;</span>,
  },
  {
    <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Dubai Marina Duplex&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">location</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Dubai Marina, UAE&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">description</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Stunning duplex with 180° marina views. 3 beds + study, private terrace, concierge building. Ready to move in.&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">price</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;AED 5,750,000&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">tag</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;MARINA VIEW&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">specs</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;🛏 3 Beds · 🚿 4 Baths · 📐 2,200 sqft&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512917774080-9991f1c4c750?w=1920&amp;q=85&#x27;</span>,
  },
];

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">PropertyHero</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> sectionRef  = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> imageRefs   = useRef([]);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> cardRef     = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> tagRef      = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> activeRef   = useRef(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> isAnimating = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">false</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>);

  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-keyword">typeof</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">window</span> === <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;undefined&#x27;</span>) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.matchMedia(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)&#x27;</span>).matches) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;

    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ctx = gsap.context(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> images = imageRefs.current;
      gsap.set(images[<span class="hljs-number">0</span>], { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">clipPath</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;inset(0 100% 0 0)&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">zIndex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2</span> });
      images.slice(<span class="hljs-number">1</span>).forEach(<span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-params">img</span> =&gt;</span> gsap.set(img, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.15</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">zIndex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> }));
      gsap.set([cardRef.current, tagRef.current], { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">30</span> });

      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> entranceTl = gsap.timeline({ <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: sectionRef.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 80%&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">toggleActions</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;play none none none&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">once</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> } });
      entranceTl
        .to(images[<span class="hljs-number">0</span>], { <span class="hljs-attr">clipPath</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;inset(0 0% 0 0)&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.4</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power4.inOut&#x27;</span> })
        .to(cardRef.current, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.8</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span> }, <span class="hljs-number">0.8</span>)
        .to(tagRef.current, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.6</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span> }, <span class="hljs-number">0.9</span>);

      ScrollTrigger.create({
        <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: sectionRef.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top top&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">end</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;+=300%&#x27;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-attr">pin</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">pinSpacing</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">anticipatePin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>,
        <span class="hljs-attr">onUpdate</span>: <span class="hljs-function">(<span class="hljs-params">self</span>) =&gt;</span> {
          <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> newIndex = <span class="hljs-built_in">Math</span>.min(<span class="hljs-built_in">Math</span>.floor(self.progress * <span class="hljs-number">4</span>), PROPERTIES.length - <span class="hljs-number">1</span>);
          <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (newIndex !== activeRef.current &amp;&amp; !isAnimating.current) transitionScene(newIndex, images);
        },
      });
    }, sectionRef);

    <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> ctx.revert();
  <span class="hljs-comment">// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps</span>
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> transitionScene = <span class="hljs-function">(<span class="hljs-params">newIndex, images</span>) =&gt;</span> {
    isAnimating.current = <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> prevIndex = activeRef.current;
    activeRef.current = newIndex;
    gsap.to(cardRef.current, {
      <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">25</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.35</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.in&#x27;</span>,
      <span class="hljs-attr">onComplete</span>: <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
        setActiveIndex(newIndex);
        gsap.set(images[newIndex], { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.18</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">zIndex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3</span> });
        gsap.to(images[newIndex], { <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">onComplete</span>: <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> { gsap.set(images[prevIndex], { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">zIndex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> }); gsap.set(images[newIndex], { <span class="hljs-attr">zIndex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2</span> }); isAnimating.current = <span class="hljs-literal">false</span>; } });
        gsap.to(images[prevIndex], { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scale</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.96</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.8</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span> });
        gsap.fromTo(cardRef.current, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">45</span> }, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.75</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">delay</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.25</span> });
        gsap.fromTo(tagRef.current, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10</span> }, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">delay</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.3</span> });
      },
    });
  };

  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> prop = PROPERTIES[activeIndex];

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">section</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{sectionRef}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">position:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">relative</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">100vh</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">overflow:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">hidden</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">0D0C0A</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
      {PROPERTIES.map((p, i) =&gt; (
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{p.id}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{el</span> =&gt;</span> imageRefs.current[i] = el} style={{ position: &#x27;absolute&#x27;, inset: 0, transformOrigin: &#x27;center center&#x27;, willChange: &#x27;transform, opacity&#x27; }}&gt;
          {/* eslint-disable-next-line @next/next/no-img-element */}
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">img</span> <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{p.image}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">alt</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{p.name}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">width:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">100</span>%&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">100</span>%&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">objectFit:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">cover</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">display:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">block</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">WebkitBackfaceVisibility:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">hidden</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">backfaceVisibility:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">hidden</span>&#x27; }} /&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">position:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">absolute</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">inset:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">linear-gradient</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">to</span> <span class="hljs-attr">right</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">15</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">12</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">10</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.72</span>) <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>%, <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">15</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">12</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">10</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.3</span>) <span class="hljs-attr">45</span>%, <span class="hljs-attr">transparent</span> <span class="hljs-attr">70</span>%), <span class="hljs-attr">linear-gradient</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">to</span> <span class="hljs-attr">top</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">15</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">12</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">10</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.4</span>) <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>%, <span class="hljs-attr">transparent</span> <span class="hljs-attr">40</span>%)&#x27; }} /&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      ))}

      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{tagRef}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">position:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">absolute</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">top:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">2rem</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">right:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">2rem</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">zIndex:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">30</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">250</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">247</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">242</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.1</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">WebkitBackdropFilter:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">blur</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">12px</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">backdropFilter:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">blur</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">12px</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">border:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">1px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">solid</span> <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">250</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">247</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">242</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.18</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">borderRadius:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">100px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">padding:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">7px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">18px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">FAF7F2</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">10px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">letterSpacing:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">0.22em</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">DM</span> <span class="hljs-attr">Sans</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">sans-serif</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontWeight:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">400</span> }}&gt;</span>
        {prop.tag}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{cardRef}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">position:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">absolute</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">bottom:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">8</span>%&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">left:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">1.5rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">6vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">5rem</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">zIndex:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">30</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">255</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.96</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">WebkitBackdropFilter:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">blur</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">24px</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">backdropFilter:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">blur</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">24px</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">borderRadius:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">20px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">padding:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">28px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">28px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">24px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">width:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">240px</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">28vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">300px</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">boxShadow:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">0</span> <span class="hljs-attr">24px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">70px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">15</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">12</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">10</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.22</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h3</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">Cormorant</span> <span class="hljs-attr">Garamond</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">serif</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontWeight:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">700</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">1rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">2vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">1.3rem</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">1A1714</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">lineHeight:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">1.15</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">margin:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">0</span> }}&gt;</span>{prop.name}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h3</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">DM</span> <span class="hljs-attr">Sans</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">sans-serif</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontWeight:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">300</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">12px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">marginTop:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">5px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>📍 {prop.location}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">DM</span> <span class="hljs-attr">Sans</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">sans-serif</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontWeight:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">300</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">12px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">7A7470</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">lineHeight:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">1.78</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">marginTop:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">10px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{prop.description}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        {/* Spec row */}
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">DM</span> <span class="hljs-attr">Sans</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">sans-serif</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">10px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">letterSpacing:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">0.1em</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">marginTop:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">10px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{prop.specs}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">display:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">flex</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">alignItems:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">center</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">gap:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">6px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">marginTop:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">14px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
          {PROPERTIES.map((_, i) =&gt; (
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">4px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">width:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">i</span> === <span class="hljs-string">activeIndex</span> ? &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">22px</span>&#x27; <span class="hljs-attr">:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">4px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">borderRadius:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">100px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">i</span> === <span class="hljs-string">activeIndex</span> ? &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">1A1714</span>&#x27; <span class="hljs-attr">:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">D4C8BC</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">transition:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">all</span> <span class="hljs-attr">0.45s</span> <span class="hljs-attr">cubic-bezier</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0.4</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">0.2</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">1</span>)&#x27; }} /&gt;</span>
          ))}
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">1px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">20</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">17</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">14</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.07</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">margin:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">16px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>&#x27; }} /&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">display:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">flex</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">justifyContent:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">space-between</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">alignItems:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">center</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">DM</span> <span class="hljs-attr">Sans</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">sans-serif</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">9px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">letterSpacing:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">0.18em</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">marginBottom:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">4px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>LISTED PRICE<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">Cormorant</span> <span class="hljs-attr">Garamond</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">serif</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontWeight:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">600</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0.95rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">2vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">1.2rem</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">1A1714</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{prop.price}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;#lead-form&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">1A1714</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">FAF7F2</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">border:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">none</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">borderRadius:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">100px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">padding:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">10px</span> <span class="hljs-attr">18px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">11px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">DM</span> <span class="hljs-attr">Sans</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">sans-serif</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">letterSpacing:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">0.05em</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">textDecoration:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">none</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">display:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">inline-block</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            Enquire →
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">position:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">absolute</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">right:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">2rem</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">bottom:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">50</span>%&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">transform:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">translateY</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">50</span>%)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">zIndex:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">30</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">display:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">flex</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">flexDirection:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">column</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">alignItems:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">center</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">gap:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">8px</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
        {PROPERTIES.map((_, i) =&gt; (
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">width:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">2px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">i</span> === <span class="hljs-string">activeIndex</span> ? &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">28px</span>&#x27; <span class="hljs-attr">:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">12px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">borderRadius:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">2px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">background:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">i</span> === <span class="hljs-string">activeIndex</span> ? &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">250</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">247</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">242</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.9</span>)&#x27; <span class="hljs-attr">:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">250</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">247</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">242</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.25</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">transition:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">all</span> <span class="hljs-attr">0.4s</span> <span class="hljs-attr">cubic-bezier</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0.4</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">0.2</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">1</span>)&#x27; }} /&gt;</span>
        ))}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">position:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">absolute</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">bottom:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">2rem</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">right:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">2rem</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">zIndex:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">30</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">Cormorant</span> <span class="hljs-attr">Garamond</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">serif</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">13px</span>&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">250</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">247</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">242</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.35</span>)&#x27;, <span class="hljs-attr">letterSpacing:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">0.05em</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
        {String(activeIndex + 1).padStart(2, &#x27;0&#x27;)} / {String(PROPERTIES.length).padStart(2, &#x27;0&#x27;)}
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">section</span>&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=components\sections\Servicesjsx anchor=true>components\sections\Servicesjsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect, useRef, useState } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> Image <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;next/image&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;../../lib/gsap&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> accordionItems = [
  { <span class="hljs-attr">num</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;01&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">title</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Residential Sales&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;From studios to penthouses — we represent Dubai\&#x27;s finest ready properties with full legal support, DLD registration, and transparent pricing.&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600210491892-03d54c0aaf87?w=700&amp;q=80&#x27;</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">num</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;02&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">title</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Off-Plan Investment&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Exclusive access to pre-launch pricing from Emaar, Damac, Sobha, Meraas and other top developers — before public release.&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">null</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">num</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;03&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">title</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Golden Visa Properties&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Properties qualifying for UAE 10-year Golden Visa from AED 2M. Full application support, legal guidance, and NOC assistance included.&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">null</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">num</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;04&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">title</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Property Management&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Full management service for investors. Tenant sourcing, maintenance coordination, and 6-8% annual yield on prime Dubai locations.&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">null</span> },
  { <span class="hljs-attr">num</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;05&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">title</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Mortgage &amp; Finance&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;UAE and international bank connections. Up to 80% LTV for UAE residents. Free mortgage pre-approval in 48 hours.&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">image</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">null</span> },
];

<span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> serviceNames = accordionItems.map(<span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-params">i</span> =&gt;</span> i.title);

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">Services</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ref = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> [active, setActive] = useState(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>);

  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.matchMedia(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)&#x27;</span>).matches) <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ctx = gsap.context(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.services-label&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.7</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 78%&#x27;</span> } });
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.services-heading&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">40</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.9</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 75%&#x27;</span> } });
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.service-list li&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">45</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.09</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.7</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 70%&#x27;</span> } });
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.services-cta&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">y</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.6</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 65%&#x27;</span> } });
      gsap.from(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.accordion-item&#x27;</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: <span class="hljs-number">55</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">stagger</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.8</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power3.out&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">scrollTrigger</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">trigger</span>: ref.current, <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;top 68%&#x27;</span> } });
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> lis = ref.current.querySelectorAll(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;.service-list li&#x27;</span>);
      lis.forEach(<span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-params">li</span> =&gt;</span> {
        li.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mouseenter&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> gsap.to(li, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.3</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span> }));
        li.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;mouseleave&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> gsap.to(li, { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.3</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;power2.out&#x27;</span> }));
      });
    }, ref);
    <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> ctx.revert();
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">section</span> <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{ref}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;services&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">backgroundColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">FAF7F2</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[5fr_7fr] min-h-screen section-pad gap-10 lg:gap-16&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex flex-col justify-center gap-8 sm:gap-10&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;services-label font-dm text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase mb-5 block&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>What We Offer<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h2</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;services-heading font-cormorant font-semibold text-charcoal leading-tight&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">2rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">4vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">3.2rem</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
              Find, Buy &amp;<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">br</span> /&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">em</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-light&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Invest with ELARIS<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">em</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h2</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">ul</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;service-list flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
            {serviceNames.map((s, i) =&gt; (
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">li</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">onClick</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{()</span> =&gt;</span> setActive(i)}
                className={`font-cormorant cursor-none transition-all duration-300 ${active === i ? &#x27;active text-charcoal font-semibold&#x27; : &#x27;text-charcoal/35 font-light hover:text-charcoal/65&#x27;}`}
                style={{ fontSize: &#x27;clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem)&#x27; }}&gt;{s}
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>
            ))}
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">ul</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;#listings&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;services-cta font-dm text-[11px] sm:text-[12px] tracking-widest border text-charcoal px-7 sm:px-8 py-3.5 sm:py-4 rounded-full inline-flex w-fit hover:bg-charcoal hover:text-cream transition-all&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">borderColor:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">2E2A24</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
            View All Properties →
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex flex-col justify-center divide-y&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">borderColor:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">46</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">42</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">36</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.1</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
          {accordionItems.map((item, i) =&gt; (
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{i}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;accordion-item py-4 sm:py-5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">button</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;w-full flex items-center justify-between text-left gap-4&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">onClick</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{()</span> =&gt;</span> setActive(active === i ? -1 : i)}&gt;
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;flex items-center gap-4 sm:gap-5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] tracking-widest flex-shrink-0&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;#<span class="hljs-attr">C4B8A8</span>&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{item.num}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{</span>`<span class="hljs-attr">font-cormorant</span> <span class="hljs-attr">transition-all</span> ${<span class="hljs-attr">active</span> === <span class="hljs-string">i</span> ? &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">text-charcoal</span> <span class="hljs-attr">font-semibold</span>&#x27; <span class="hljs-attr">:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">text-charcoal</span>/<span class="hljs-attr">55</span> <span class="hljs-attr">font-light</span>&#x27;}`} <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fontSize:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">1rem</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">2vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">1.45rem</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{item.title}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;text-charcoal/35 flex-shrink-0 text-lg transition-transform duration-300&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">transform:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">active</span> === <span class="hljs-string">i</span> ? &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rotate</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">45deg</span>)&#x27; <span class="hljs-attr">:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rotate</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">0deg</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>+<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">button</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{</span>`<span class="hljs-attr">accordion-content</span> ${<span class="hljs-attr">active</span> === <span class="hljs-string">i</span> ? &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">open</span>&#x27; <span class="hljs-attr">:</span> &#x27;&#x27;}`}&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;pt-4 pl-9 sm:pl-10 pr-2&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
                  {item.image &amp;&amp; (
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;relative w-full rounded-lg overflow-hidden mb-4&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">clamp</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">140px</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">22vw</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">200px</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>
                      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">Image</span> <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{item.image}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">alt</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{item.title}</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fill</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;object-cover&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">sizes</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;(max-width: 1024px) 90vw, 50vw&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
                    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
                  )}
                  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;font-dm text-[12px] sm:text-[13px] leading-relaxed max-w-md&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">color:</span> &#x27;<span class="hljs-attr">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-attr">46</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">42</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">36</span>,<span class="hljs-attr">0.58</span>)&#x27; }}&gt;</span>{item.text}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
              <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
          ))}
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">section</span>&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=components\ui\WhatsAppButtonjsx anchor=true>components\ui\WhatsAppButtonjsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect, useRef } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;../../lib/gsap&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">WhatsAppButton</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
  <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> btnRef = useRef(<span class="hljs-literal">null</span>);

  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    gsap.fromTo(btnRef.current,
      { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: <span class="hljs-number">80</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> },
      { <span class="hljs-attr">x</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.6</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">ease</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;back.out(1.4)&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">delay</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2</span> }
    );
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> (
    <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span>
      <span class="hljs-attr">ref</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{btnRef}</span>
      <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;https://wa.me/971XXXXXXXXX?text=Hi%20ELARIS%2C%20I%20found%20your%20website%20and%20I%20am%20interested%20in%20Dubai%20properties.%20Please%20get%20in%20touch.&quot;</span>
      <span class="hljs-attr">target</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;_blank&quot;</span>
      <span class="hljs-attr">rel</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;noopener noreferrer&quot;</span>
      <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;whatsapp-sticky&quot;</span>
      <span class="hljs-attr">aria-label</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;Chat on WhatsApp&quot;</span>
    &gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">svg</span> <span class="hljs-attr">viewBox</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;0 0 24 24&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">width</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;26&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">height</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;26&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">fill</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;white&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-attr">style</span>=<span class="hljs-string">{{</span> <span class="hljs-attr">flexShrink:</span> <span class="hljs-attr">0</span> }}&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">path</span> <span class="hljs-attr">d</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347z&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">path</span> <span class="hljs-attr">d</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;M12 0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 2.122.558 4.112 1.528 5.837L.057 23.885a.5.5 0 00.612.612l6.048-1.471A11.946 11.946 0 0012 24c6.627 0 12-5.373 12-12S18.627 0 12 0zm0 21.818a9.814 9.814 0 01-5.028-1.382l-.36-.214-3.732.907.922-3.646-.235-.374A9.818 9.818 0 012.182 12C2.182 6.57 6.57 2.182 12 2.182S21.818 6.57 21.818 12 17.43 21.818 12 21.818z&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">svg</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">className</span>=<span class="hljs-string">&quot;whatsapp-label&quot;</span>&gt;</span>Chat Now<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span></span>
  );
}

</code></pre>
<h4 id=lib\gsapjs anchor=true>lib\gsapjs</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;gsap&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { ScrollTrigger } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;gsap/ScrollTrigger&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-keyword">typeof</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">window</span> !== <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;undefined&#x27;</span>) {
  gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);
}

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> { gsap, ScrollTrigger };

</code></pre>

<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>

  <span class="hljs-attr">images</span>: {
    <span class="hljs-attr">remotePatterns</span>: [
      {
        <span class="hljs-attr">protocol</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;https&#x27;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-attr">hostname</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;images.unsplash.com&#x27;</span>,
      },
    ],
  },
};

<span class="hljs-built_in">module</span>.exports = nextConfig;

<h4 id=providers\SmoothScrollProviderjsx anchor=true>providers\SmoothScrollProviderjsx</h4>
<p><a href="#Contents">to top</a></p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript"><span class="hljs-string">&#x27;use client&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { useEffect } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;react&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> Lenis <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;@studio-freight/lenis&#x27;</span>;
<span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> { gsap, ScrollTrigger } <span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;../lib/gsap&#x27;</span>;

<span class="hljs-keyword">export</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">default</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">SmoothScrollProvider</span>(<span class="hljs-params">{ children }</span>) </span>{
  useEffect(<span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> lenis = <span class="hljs-keyword">new</span> Lenis({
      <span class="hljs-attr">duration</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.2</span>,
      <span class="hljs-attr">easing</span>: <span class="hljs-function">(<span class="hljs-params">t</span>) =&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">Math</span>.min(<span class="hljs-number">1</span>, <span class="hljs-number">1.001</span> - <span class="hljs-built_in">Math</span>.pow(<span class="hljs-number">2</span>, -<span class="hljs-number">10</span> * t)),
      <span class="hljs-attr">orientation</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;vertical&#x27;</span>,
      <span class="hljs-attr">smoothWheel</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>,
    });

    lenis.on(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;scroll&#x27;</span>, ScrollTrigger.update);

    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> ticker = <span class="hljs-function">(<span class="hljs-params">time</span>) =&gt;</span> { lenis.raf(time * <span class="hljs-number">1000</span>); };
    gsap.ticker.add(ticker);
    gsap.ticker.lagSmoothing(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>);

    <span class="hljs-comment">// Refresh after all resources load — fixes incorrect scroll positions</span>
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> onLoad = <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      ScrollTrigger.refresh();
    };
    <span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;load&#x27;</span>, onLoad);

    <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-function">() =&gt;</span> {
      lenis.destroy();
      gsap.ticker.remove(ticker);
      <span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.removeEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;load&#x27;</span>, onLoad);
    };
  }, []);

  <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;&gt;</span>{children}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/&gt;</span></span>;
}

</code></pre>

<span class="hljs-built_in">module</span>.exports = {
  <span class="hljs-attr">content</span>: [
    <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;./pages/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mdx}&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;./components/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mdx}&#x27;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;./app/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mdx}&#x27;</span>,
  ],
  <span class="hljs-attr">theme</span>: {
    <span class="hljs-attr">extend</span>: {
      <span class="hljs-attr">colors</span>: {
        <span class="hljs-attr">cream</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#F5EDE3&#x27;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-attr">offwhite</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#FAF7F2&#x27;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-attr">charcoal</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#2E2A24&#x27;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-attr">stone</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;#C4B8A8&#x27;</span>,
      },
      <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily</span>: {
        <span class="hljs-attr">cormorant</span>: [<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Cormorant Garamond&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;serif&#x27;</span>],
        <span class="hljs-attr">dm</span>: [<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;DM Sans&#x27;</span>, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;sans-serif&#x27;</span>],
      },
      <span class="hljs-attr">transitionTimingFunction</span>: {
        <span class="hljs-attr">luxury</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)&#x27;</span>,
      },
    },
  },
  <span class="hljs-attr">plugins</span>: [],
};
